search_queries: "Mitigation strategies for DDoS attacks targeting RAN network tier, focusing on high-impact features such as udps.srcdst_rst_packet_count, udps.srcdst_syn_packet_count, and udps.syn_packet_count. Include best practices for handling high packet counts and traffic anomalies."
